arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea beat Premier League rivals to sign young attacker in a £30m deal
arts.sum: Chelsea have been the most active Premier League club when it comes to making signings in recent transfer windows. That’s why it comes as a huge surprise that they have not made any new signing in the winter transfer window. arts.ttl: West Ham set to beat Arsenal, Man Utd to 'statement' signing; Chelsea to sell two England stars
arts.sum: The website’s transfer correspondent, Pete O’Rourke, insists that there is a “good chance” West Ham will beat Arsenal, Man Utd, Chelsea and other clubs to the signing of the England international. West Ham have reportedly taken the lead in the race to sign Brentford striker Ivan Toney amid interest from Arsenal, Man Utd and Chelsea.
